title: Huawei USG — Address/service objects with security-policy

source.description: Address-set and service-set objects with security-policy rules across trust/dmz/untrust zones

config.description: Address-set and service-set object definitions with security-policy rules referencing objects across trust/dmz/untrust zones

expected_translation.high_level: Cisco ASA equivalent with object-group network, object-group service, access-list with object-group, and access-group

verification.notes: non-deployable because missing object-group reference — P0-3 tracked. LLM output missing object-group definitions for address-set/service-set mapping. Must NOT be covered by annotation; requires analyzer/knowledge/prompt fix. Keep deployable=false until root cause resolved.
